tool_input.description: Cross-check HTML IDs vs JS refs

tool_input.old_string: LIVEEIA / OPEC / OFAC / Kpler / CEIC
tool_input.new_string:
LOADING Fetching latest headlines...
LIVEEIA / OPEC / OFAC / Kpler / CEIC

tool_input.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Serve dashboard as static HTML + add news ribbon

- Bypass React hydration entirely — serve the original HTML from public/
- page.tsx redirects to /dashboard.html (zero JS framework overhead)
- Added scrolling news ribbon below topbar (fetches /api/news)
- Live price injection fetches /api/prices on load
- Duplicate headlines for seamless infinite scroll effect

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push origin main
tool_input.description: Commit and push static HTML approach

tool_input.command:
git add public/dashboard.html && git commit -m "Fix news ribbon: API returns {items:[...]} not bare array

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>" && git push origin main

git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Mobile UI + slower news ribbon + X posts + multi-source news

- Mobile responsive: 768px and 480px breakpoints with proper
  KPI grid, chart heights, table density, scenario card collapse
- News ribbon slowed from 60s to 140s animation
- /api/x endpoint for Twitter/X posts (needs TWITTER_BEARER_TOKEN env var)
- /api/news now queries 4 RSS feeds in parallel (Venezuela oil,
  PDVSA/Chevron, Brent/Hormuz, OPEC) — deduped, sorted by recency, top 15
- Ribbon shows X posts (blue tag) + news (amber tag) with source attribution
- Falls back gracefully to news-only when X token not configured

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push origin main
